column1: Capri Global is a diversified Non-Banking Financial Company (NBFC) with a presence across diverse segments like MSME, Affordable Housing, Construction Finance segments, and Car Loan distribution; forayed into Gold Loans in Aug 22. Capri Global also owns UP Warriorz which is an Indian professional franchise women's cricket team that compete in the Women's Premier League (WPL), based in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh. [1] [2]
